one_time_description: Adoption of PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations effective April 1, 2022, resulting in recognition of $1,050,000 ARO liability and $1,263,000 increase in tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Canoe Lake Resource Development Inc. and Eagles Lake Community Store LP are GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Both entities reported net losses in 2023. First Nation is member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (nine nations). Canoe Lake Treaty Land Entitlement Trust not consolidated.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). First Nation is in Treaty Six Territory, Saskatchewan. Two GBEs (Canoe Lake Resource Development Inc. and Eagles Lake Community Store LP) both reported losses and negative net assets. First Nation not in compliance with all long-term debt financial covenants per Note 13. New accounting standards PS 3280 and PS 3450 adopted prospectively April 1, 2022. Canoe Lake Treaty Land Entitlement Trust excluded from consolidation. Total government transfers estimated by summing ISC, MLTC Program Services, Meadow Lake Health & Social Development Authority, MLTC Child & Family Services, CMHC, Government of Saskatchewan, Saskatchewan Lotteries, and Saskatchewan Rivers School Division. Audit report signed March 24, 2025 for March 31, 2023 year-end — significant delay. expenses_housing mapped to Capital segment.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
